overview: GSK Management is a professional website for an entertainment, travel, and event management company. It showcases services across all three verticals with rich content, featured events, travel packages, team profiles, testimonials, and an inquiry contact form.
features: Entertainment services showcase (artist management, talent booking, concert production)
Travel packages with destinations, pricing, and highlights
Event management programs covering corporate, weddings, concerts, and conferences
Featured events and travel experiences with rich imagery
Contact & inquiry form with service-type dropdown
Smooth navigation with mobile hamburger menu
